results.title: HKSAR V. HO CHEUK MAN, RAY
results.charge: Offence: (1) Trafficking in dangerous drugs (販運危險藥物) in HCCC 233/2023 (2) Manufacturing a dangerous drug (製造危險藥物) in HCCC 233/2023 (1) Possession of a dangerous drug (管有危險藥物) in HCCC 234/2023
results.representations: Present: Mr John Marray, on fiat, for HKSAR Mr Gordon Wong, instructed by Johnnie Yam, Jacky Lee & Co, assigned by the DLA, for the accused
